action_set_definitions.name: get_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time and a list of all active vehicle units in the network to identify specific service variants.

action_set_definitions.name: get_vehicle_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Provides real-time data for a specific vehicle, including its delay in seconds (positive for late, negative for early) and current stop information.

vehicle_id.description: The unique identifier for the vehicle (e.g., 'V-402-9').

action_set_definitions.name: check_geospatial_boundary
action_set_definitions.description: Determines if a vehicle is positioned north or south of a specific landmark to ensure compliance with operational restrictions.

vehicle_id.description: The ID of the vehicle to check.

landmark.description: The street or landmark used as a boundary (e.g., '10th Street').

action_set_definitions.name: get_depot_standby_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries a specific depot for the list of available standby operators.

depot_name.description: The name of the depot (e.g., 'South Side Depot').

action_set_definitions.name: apply_recovery_directive
action_set_definitions.description: Issues operational directives to adjust the schedule of a vehicle. This action updates the 'delay_seconds' attribute in the environment state to reflect the impact of the directive.

strategy.description: The strategy to mitigate delay or early arrival. Use 'hold_at_stop' or 'increase_dwell_time' for early arrivals.

target_value.description: The target arrival time or the duration for the hold (e.g., '09:30:00' or '120s').

action_set_definitions.name: assign_crew_to_vehicle
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a standby operator to a vehicle for service reinforcement.

state_description.current_sim_time: The current clock time in the simulation (ISO 8601 format or HH:MM:SS).
state_description.active_vehicles: List of vehicles currently in service, including their ID, current coordinates or nearest stop, passenger load, and current delay relative to schedule.
state_description.disruptions: List of active incidents affecting the network (e.g., accidents, roadwork, vehicle breakdowns).
state_description.crew_availability: Status of standby drivers and operators at various depots.
state_description.network_status: Overall health of the transit network, including congestion levels on major corridors.
